# Bankruptcy Discharge - What It Means and How It Works
> Complete guide to bankruptcy discharge. What debts are eliminated, when you receive it, what happens after, and the discharge injunction.

## About
bankruptcydischarge.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- How Long Between Bankruptcies? Filing Time Limits Explained - Discharge: https://bankruptcydischarge.org/how-long-between-bankruptcies.html
- Bankruptcy Discharge - What It Means and How It Works: https://bankruptcydischarge.org/
- Time Between Discharges - Bankruptcy Filing Interval Rules: https://bankruptcydischarge.org/time-between-discharges.html
- Privacy Policy: https://bankruptcydischarge.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
